title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
